title: Fix coin counter bug and reposition minimap + joystick

requirements.summary: Fix coin collection counter initialization and increment logic to prevent negative overflow
acceptanceCriteria: Coin counter initializes to 0 at game start
Each coin pickup increments the counter by exactly 1 (or the correct coin value)
Counter displays correctly as 'collected/target' (e.g., '1/30') with no overflow or sign errors

file_operations.description: Fix the coin counter state initialization and update logic in the useSpaceSnakeGame hook. Ensure coinsCollected initializes to 0 in the initial game state and that coin collection increments the counter by exactly 1 (or the pickup's value field) without arithmetic errors. Review the collision detection and coin pickup handling to ensure the counter never goes negative or overflows.

Verify that SpaceSnakeMissionBanner correctly receives and displays the coinsCollected and coinsTarget props. Ensure the display format is 'collected/target' and that negative or malformed values are handled gracefully (e.g., clamping to 0 or showing an error state).

requirements.summary: Move minimap component to the top-left corner of the screen
acceptanceCriteria: Minimap is positioned at the top-left corner of the screen
Minimap does not overlap the mission banner or other top-center HUD elements
Minimap remains fully visible and does not clip off screen edges

file_operations.description: Update the positioning styles for the SpaceSnakeMinimap component in SpaceSnakeScreen.tsx. Change the absolute positioning from right-side to top-left corner using appropriate top and left values (e.g., top-4 left-4 or equivalent spacing). Ensure the minimap does not overlap the top-center SpaceSnakeMissionBanner and remains fully visible within the viewport.

requirements.summary: Move joystick component upward from the bottom edge of the screen
acceptanceCriteria: Joystick is visually raised from the bottom edge by a noticeable margin (e.g., at least 16–24px or equivalent spacing)
Joystick remains in the lower-left area of the screen and is fully accessible via touch

file_operations.description: Update the positioning styles for the SpaceSnakeJoystick component in SpaceSnakeScreen.tsx. Adjust the bottom positioning value to add a noticeable margin (e.g., change from bottom-0 to bottom-4 or bottom-6) so the joystick is raised from the very bottom edge while remaining in the lower-left area and fully accessible for touch input.
